summary: Nagarik Sahayak v2.0 - All V2 API endpoints and frontend features verified. Backend: 28/28 tests passed. Frontend: All 13 requested features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/v2/schemes returns 4 schemes (PMAY-U, Vidyasiri, Startup India Seed Fund, PM-KISAN)
BACKEND: All 4 schemes have correct categories (housing, education, startup, agriculture)
BACKEND: GET /api/v2/form-templates returns 4 templates with correct totalFields
BACKEND: PMAY-U template has 22 fields
BACKEND: Vidyasiri template has 20 fields
BACKEND: Startup India Seed Fund template has 21 fields
BACKEND: PM-KISAN template has 19 fields
BACKEND: GET /api/v2/form-template/PM-KISAN%20Samman%20Nidhi returns 19 extractedFields and 5 sections
BACKEND: Form template fields have labelHindi, labelEnglish, profileKey, required properties
BACKEND: Nonexistent form template returns 404
BACKEND: POST /api/v2/user-profile/{user_id} saves profile fields correctly
BACKEND: GET /api/v2/user-profile/{user_id} returns saved fullProfile
BACKEND: Profile update merges fields (doesn't overwrite existing)
BACKEND: Invalid user_id returns 404
BACKEND: POST /api/v2/smart-profiler returns filledCount, missingCount, totalFields, progress
BACKEND: Smart profiler returns nextQuestion with questionHindi and profileKey
BACKEND: Smart profiler works with multiple schemes (fields deduplicated)
BACKEND: POST /api/v2/generate-filled-forms returns pdf_urls array
BACKEND: PDF URL format is correct (/api/pdf/{uuid})
BACKEND: GET /api/pdf/{uuid} downloads generated PDF with application/pdf content-type
BACKEND: Invalid PDF UUID returns 404
FRONTEND: Login flow with phone 9876543210 and OTP 1234 works
FRONTEND: Chat page shows SchemeSelector when no messages and v2Mode is idle
FRONTEND: All 4 scheme cards visible (housing, education, startup, agriculture)
FRONTEND: Selecting scheme shows Proceed button
FRONTEND: Clicking Proceed transitions to SmartProfiler mode (profiling)
FRONTEND: SmartProfiler shows progress bar (0/19 0%)
FRONTEND: SmartProfiler shows current question in Hindi ('कृपया बताएं: किसान का नाम')
FRONTEND: SmartProfiler shows section name (FARMER DETAILS)
FRONTEND: SmartProfiler shows submit button ('आगे बढ़ें')
FRONTEND: New Chat button resets to scheme selection view
FRONTEND: Toast shows 'नई चैट शुरू हो गई!' on reset
critical_code_review_comments: V2 API endpoints properly implemented with correct response formats
FormTemplate collection seeded with 82 total fields across 4 schemes
Smart profiler correctly deduplicates fields when multiple schemes selected
User fullProfile stored in MongoDB and merged on updates
SchemeSelector uses data-testid for all 4 category cards
SmartProfiler shows Hindi labels with English translations
seed_data_creation: 4 Schemes and 4 FormTemplates seeded via prisma/seed.py with 82 total form fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 verified Nagarik Sahayak v2.0 upgrade. All V2 endpoints working: /api/v2/schemes (4 schemes), /api/v2/form-templates (4 templates with 19-22 fields each), /api/v2/form-template/{name} (full field details), /api/v2/user-profile (save/get fullProfile), /api/v2/smart-profiler (tracks filled/missing fields), /api/v2/generate-filled-forms (generates PDFs). Frontend SchemeSelector shows 4 cards with category icons. SmartProfiler guides user through questions with progress bar. New Chat button resets to scheme selection.
